description: Composition Black printed kurta made of a blended fabric, has a round neck with black and gold embellishments and beads, and has broad armholes Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only This piece of art by aneri is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics Product is a size S on a model of height-5.7", Chest-33" and Waist-26"
